content.headline: Austin's Most Trusted Real Estate Team
content.subheadline: Serving the Austin metroplex with 20+ years of market expertise, $555M+ in closed sales, and a referral-first reputation built since 2003.

content.heading: Current Listings
content.subheading: Properties across Austin's most sought-after communities — from Westlake and Eanes ISD to the waterfront and beyond.

content.introLine: Top 1% of REALTORS® Nationwide — Ranked #7 in Austin by Austin Business Journal
content.heading: Jessica Bruehl
content.bodyCopy:
Jessica Bruehl has been the standard for real estate advisory in Austin since 2003. As founder and Broker of Signature Residential Group, she built a team of specialists — each focused on a distinct part of the transaction process — so that no client ever gets a generalist when they need an expert. With over $555M in career sales and 1,200+ homes closed, Jessica personally oversees every client relationship and transaction the team touches.

Her perspective on real estate is shaped by something most agents can't claim: she's been an active investor since before she became a licensed agent, purchasing her first property as a UT Austin student on an athletic scholarship, and building a personal portfolio of single-family homes, condos, and short-term rentals across Texas and Colorado. That investor's lens informs every pricing strategy, negotiation, and market call she makes on behalf of her clients.

Jessica and her team serve buyers, sellers, investors, and relocating clients — from Austin locals to those moving from across the country or internationally — with the same advisory depth and attention to detail that has kept 98% of the team's business coming from repeat clients and personal referrals.

content.heading: The Numbers Behind the Name
content.bodyCopy: Since 2003, Signature Residential Group has operated on a single principle: every client's outcome matters more than the next transaction. The result is a business built almost entirely on trust — 98% of sales have come from repeat clients or personal referrals. Consistency like that doesn't happen by accident.

content.heading: Where We Work
content.subheading: Deep knowledge of Austin's most distinct neighborhoods and surrounding communities.

areaCards.description: Urban Austin at its most vibrant. Condos, lofts, and walkable living in the heart of the city.
Lake Austin and Lake Travis properties where the lifestyle is as valuable as the land.
The most sought-after school district in the metro, with established neighborhoods and exceptional homes.
A dynamic, fast-evolving corridor blending new development with Austin's creative culture.

areaCards.areaName: Texas Hill Country & Lake Travis ISD
areaCards.description: Acreage, privacy, and wide-open spaces with strong school access and proximity to the city.
Established, character-rich neighborhoods with strong long-term value.
A fast-growing corridor with excellent access, new construction, and strong investment fundamentals.
Southern expansion market with growing communities and compelling entry-level luxury options.
Northern growth hub offering space, value, and convenient access to the metro.

content.heading: How We Can Help
content.descriptor: Whether you're buying, selling, investing, or relocating — the team is built to handle every dimension of your transaction.

content.heading: (Example Section) Search Smarter
content.note: This is an example of what this section could look like on your site.
content.bodyCopy: Browse active listings, save your favorites, and receive real-time alerts when new properties hit the market. The Signature Home Search app gives you direct access to the team's inventory with local context the major portals can't provide.

content.heading: (Example Section) The Signature Edition
content.note: This is an example of what this section could look like on your site.
content.bodyCopy: A quarterly look at Austin's luxury market — featuring exclusive property previews, design trends, neighborhood spotlights, and conversations with the people shaping the communities we call home. Each issue is crafted for the Austin buyer and seller who wants context, not just listings.

content.heading: The Friends & Family Club
content.bodyCopy: The relationship doesn't end at closing. The Friends & Family Club is Signature Residential Group's monthly perks program for past clients, referral partners, and the broader community built around the team since 2003. Members receive exclusive market insights, curated local resources, and access to a network that reflects the same trust-first values the team has always operated by. It's not a newsletter — it's the inner circle.

testimonials.name: Karen E.
testimonials.quote: Jessica and her team were fantastic. With both owners out of state, she handled everything — cleaning, staging, repairs, and check-ins — giving us total peace of mind. Her market expertise led to a full-price offer just four days after listing.

testimonials.name: Rachael M.
testimonials.quote: Jessica and her team at Signature Residential Group are the best. We've worked with them for over eight years on both buying and selling, and their expertise, attention to detail, and local market knowledge are unmatched.

testimonials.name: Charles D.
testimonials.quote: After our home sat on the market for months, the team gave us a smart, strategic plan. With their guidance on pricing and staging, we were under contract in just two weeks with an all-cash offer.

testimonials.name: Verified Client
testimonials.quote: Never have I seen the level of service, professionalism, and outright integrity Jessica exhibits. In a competitive market like Austin, you cannot afford to have anyone other than an expert working on your behalf.

testimonials.name: Verified Client
testimonials.quote: Jessica is the most amazing realtor I have met. Her attention to detail, customer service focus, and vision make her a truly different breed of realtor. She excelled in both selling and purchasing for us — two different skill sets, and with both she brought her full-service approach.

content.heading: Austin Market Insights
content.subheading: Trends, community updates, and real estate perspective from the Signature Residential team.

content.heading: Invested in Austin
content.bodyCopy: Jessica has been involved in Austin's community as long as she has been selling homes in it. She volunteers routinely, sits on several charity boards, and served as a former Chair of Austin Under 40. Her current philanthropic focus includes the Armstrong Community Music School, Austin Sunshine Camps, Austin Children's Shelter, and Keller Williams Cares — organizations that reflect a commitment to the city's most important asset: the people who live here.
